video_info.title: Talent TV Cup
video_info.shortDescription: India A face Afghanistan A in the Talent TV Cup at the Rangiri Dambulla International Stadium, Sri Lanka. Fresh off a win, Team India will look to build momentum, while Afghanistan aim to secure crucial points. It’s a showdown of rising stars as Tilak Varma’s brigade battles Imran Mir’s fearless young guns. Find out as we bring you all the action from this India A vs Afghanistan A fixture, LIVE on Sony LIV.
video_info.longDescription: India A face Afghanistan A in the Talent TV Cup at the Rangiri Dambulla International Stadium, Sri Lanka. Fresh off a win, Team India will look to build momentum, while Afghanistan aim to secure crucial points. It’s a showdown of rising stars as Tilak Varma’s brigade battles Imran Mir’s fearless young guns. Find out as we bring you all the action from this India A vs Afghanistan A fixture, LIVE on Sony LIV.
video_info.episodeTitle: India A vs Afghanistan A - 11 Jun 2026
